note: National Portrait Gallery, London. Hand-maintained capture fixture. Refresh each season from npg.org.uk/whatson/exhibitions. Future-opening only; the loader drops events whose opening has passed (e.g. the already-open 'Marilyn Monroe: A Portrait', Jun 4 2026).

items.title: Herbert Smith Freehills Kramer Portrait Award 2026
items.description: The annual contemporary portrait-painting award (free admission). 2026 shortlist: Chloe Cox, Marc Dalessio, Joel Nichols, Michael Slusakowicz

items.title: Tim Walker's Fairyland: Love and Legends
items.description: Tim Walker on queer identity, community, and love — five years of portraits of activists, performers, artists, and writers

items.title: Winston Taylor Photo Portrait Prize 2026
items.description: The renamed Taylor Wessing Photo Portrait Prize — contemporary photographic portraiture by emerging and established photographers
